people.person: a man with red hair and a woman with dark hair
people.action: standing and looking at a large, old-looking map

scene.setting: a dimly lit stone corridor with light streaming in from a high window, casting long shadows.

objects.description: A large, old-looking map with Latin text and intricate designs, held by the man.

interactions.interaction: The man and woman are standing together, looking at the map.

key_actions: The man holds the map and looks at the woman.
The woman looks at the man and then up towards the ceiling.

visual_expression.person: a man with red hair and a woman with dark hair
body_cues: the man looks at the woman
visual_expression.gaze: looking at the map, then at each other, and then up

audio_description: A male voice speaks in a calm tone, followed by a female voice speaking in a calm tone.
